definition: No allele-resolved population match after normalization/reconciliation.
Only locus or regional context is available; allele-level AF is not usable.
Ancestry-aware population maximum exceeds the operational model/review ceiling.
Carrier/recessive logic may remain coherent, but direct dominant actionability is unsupported.
No VITAL constraint displaced the label under the tested model.
Observed frequency is incompatible with an unqualified dominant high-penetrance model.
A frequency signal exists but allele-count support is limited; review is required.
Mechanism or inheritance cannot be inferred from the flattened label.
